demographics.living_situation: lives with adult child nearby / child present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My shoulders and hips are locked completely solid; I'm in agony and I physically cannot lift myself out of this bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over two days and now I can't get out of bed or reach the toilet — my child is helping me.

symptom_narrative.onset: a dull ache 2 days ago, now severe
symptom_narrative.character: severe stiffness and pain in both shoulders and hips, locked solid
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both shoulders and both hips (the girdles), not my hands/feet
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: stiff all day today; profound morning stiffness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, trying to lift myself
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: extreme fatigue; no headache, jaw pain or vision changes

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my adult child is helping me with moving, drinking and toileting

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the girdle stiffness clearly; child assists

objective_data_offered.value: both shoulders and hips are stiff and painful; hands and feet are fine
child confirms no facial droop or one-sided weakness
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: informal bystander check, not a neuro exam
